MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT AMERICAN SYNERGY, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED; the motion was not properly noticed. The motion was served by mail on 08/16/04; the requisite 26 days notice would fall on 09/13/04. (301/PHA/) Reporter: Bob Balian, CSR #5220
